name: Gateway → Claude: Architecture
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "architecture",
    "prompt": "You are a senior Google Apps Script architect. Review the following system and suggest a clean, modular structure with clear separation of concerns. Identify any anti-patterns and explain your recommendations: [DESCRIBE YOUR SYSTEM OR PASTE CODE HERE]"
  }'

name: Gateway → Claude: Debug
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "debugging",
    "prompt": "Debug the following code. Identify: 1) The most likely root cause, 2) The affected lines, 3) A corrected version with explanation. Do not rewrite unrelated parts.\n\nERROR:\n[PASTE ERROR MESSAGE]\n\nCODE:\n[PASTE CODE]"
  }'

name: Gateway → Claude: Long-Form Writing
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "long_form",
    "prompt": "Write a [TYPE: report | letter | proposal | thesis section] with clear structure (introduction, body, conclusion). Audience: [AUDIENCE]. Tone: [formal | conversational]. Topic: [TOPIC]"
  }'

name: Gateway → GPT-4o: Quick Script
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "quick_script",
    "prompt": "Write a [LANGUAGE: GAS | Python | Bash] script that [WHAT IT SHOULD DO]. Output working code only. No explanation unless the logic is non-obvious. Input format: [DESCRIBE INPUT]. Output format: [DESCRIBE OUTPUT]"
  }'

name: Gateway → GPT-4o: Prototype
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "prototype",
    "prompt": "Build a minimal working prototype of [WHAT]. Prioritize speed over polish. Use the simplest stack that works. Constraints: [LIST ANY CONSTRAINTS]. Output the full runnable code."
  }'

name: Gateway → Gemini: Mandarin Translation
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "mandarin",
    "prompt": "请将以下内容翻译成[目标语言：中文 | 英文 | 法文]，保持原意、语气和语域。如果有歧义，请提供两个版本并说明差异。\n\n原文：\n[PASTE TEXT HERE]"
  }'

name: Gateway → Gemini: OCR / Text Extraction
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "ocr",
    "prompt": "Extract and clean the text from the following source. Correct obvious OCR errors, preserve paragraph structure, and flag any characters you are uncertain about with [?]. Output clean plain text only.\n\nSOURCE:\n[PASTE RAW OCR TEXT OR DESCRIBE IMAGE CONTENT]"
  }'

name: Gateway → Perplexity: Research
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "research",
    "prompt": "Research the following topic thoroughly. Structure your response as: 1) One-paragraph summary, 2) 5 key facts or findings, 3) Cited sources with URLs. Prioritize peer-reviewed or authoritative sources. Topic: [TOPIC]"
  }'

name: Gateway → Perplexity: Current Events
text:
curl -s -X POST "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxC3q2qNHivWzRpvLZdWnH8r5uuDTUTPn-NtPG_3g2lC6Gy1ErDiDZoGzJ_LSIp-_Z6mQ/exec" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "action": "route",
    "task_type": "current_events",
    "prompt": "What are the most recent and significant developments on [TOPIC]? Include: dates, key actors, and direct source citations. Limit to events from the past [TIMEFRAME: 7 days | 30 days | 6 months]."
  }'
